_comment: Object-storage publishing config. base_url is the PUBLIC read base for the bucket (e.g. a Cloudflare R2 custom domain or <accountid>.r2.dev URL). Frozen raw inputs are served at base_url/<source.r2_object_key>; per-mark episode tables at base_url/marks/<mark_id>/<artifact>. Marks reference these by URL + SHA-256, so changing base_url does not affect integrity. Replace the placeholder before publishing.
